title: Agent
description: AIBrain/agents/<slug>.md frontmatter — see MASTER_PROMPT.md canonical Brain layout

slug.description: Stable slug, matches the agents/<slug>.md file name

tools.description: Tool/capability names this agent is permitted to use

model_hints.description: Preferred model tiers or ids, e.g. sonnet, opus — advisory only

targets.description: Tool ids this agent definition is projected to
